title: Comparative Connectomics Highlights Conserved Architectural Synaptic Motifs in the Drosophila Mushroom Body
abstract: Using network neuroscience tools across multiple EM connectome datasets, we detect conserved convergent synaptic motifs in the Drosophila mushroom body across individuals, revealing previously unrecognized multiply-convergent motifs that may optimize information transfer.
notes: Comparative connectomics approach across individual fly brains.
